dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3307 IS: Inspector General Access Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Durbin (for himself, Mr. Lee, Mr. Grassley, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Cruz, Mr. Coons, Mr. Blumenthal, Ms. Hirono, Mr. Ossoff, and Mr. Welch) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 5, United States Code, relative to the powers of the Inspector General of the Department of Justice.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Inspector General Access Act of 2025.

section.header: Investigations of Department of Justice personnel
section.text: Section 413 of title 5, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (2), by striking and paragraph (3);
by redesignating paragraphs (4) and (5) as paragraphs (3) and (4), respectively; and
in paragraph (4), as so redesignated, by striking paragraph (4) and inserting paragraph (3); and

paragraph.text: in subsection (d), by striking , except with respect to allegations described in subsection (b)(3),.
